title: Cronos Group (CRON) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos Group Q2 2024 earnings call transcript. The company reported strong revenue growth of 46% year-over-year with consolidated net revenue of $27.8 million. Gross margin improved to 23% from 16% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA improved by $4.9 million. Management highlighted achievement of record quarterly revenue with strong performance across Canadian and international markets. Spinach brand achieved number one flower brand status in Canada. The company provided guidance for $5-10 million in operating expense savings for 2024. Management noted that despite improving fundamentals, positive cash flow for 2024 was not anticipated due to significant GrowCo expansion investments.
